meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Antigravity Template for SaaS Development
content.seo_description: Overcome the SaaS knowledge gap with this expert-led Antigravity project template. A high-efficiency checklist for freelancers using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop reinventing the wheel. The Antigravity project template provides a production-ready SaaS skeleton, automating boilerplate auth, database schema, and API routing. By pairing this with Claude Code, you can scaffold, test, and deploy complex SaaS features in hours rather than weeks, allowing you to focus purely on high-value client logic.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, the client deadline is looming, and your repository is a graveyard of half-baked auth implementations and broken database migrations. You have the vision, but the technical overhead of building a scalable SaaS architecture from scratch is effectively stalling your freelance career. It is the classic 'No SaaS Knowledge' trap that separates hobbyists from high-earning architects.

Relief has arrived. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you inherit a battle-tested, modular architecture that handles the heavy lifting of infrastructure. When you integrate this with Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into an AI-augmented engine, shipping enterprise-grade software at velocity that keeps your clients coming back for more.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Start by generating the base project structure. This ensures your directory architecture, environment configuration, and dependency management are standardized from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new enterprise SaaS project using the Antigravity standard template. Include Next.js, Supabase, and TailwindCSS modules with strict TypeScript types.

steps.title: Configure Identity & Access Management
steps.description: Auth is the biggest time-sink. Use the template's pre-built patterns to implement secure, role-based access control without writing custom middleware.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the auth module with Google and Email providers. Ensure RLS policies are generated for the user_profiles and subscription_plans tables.

steps.title: Define Database Schema Patterns
steps.description: Map your client requirements to the database schema using Antigravity's optimized ORM patterns to ensure high performance and query efficiency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with projects, tasks, and billing_usage tables. Use Prisma schema syntax.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate prisma schema and run migrations'

steps.title: Implement API Routing & Middleware
steps.description: Automate the creation of secure API endpoints. Using the template's standardized structure ensures your endpoints are consistent and easily maintainable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CRUD API route for the projects module with standard error handling and Zod validation schemas.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'scaffold API routes for projects entity'

steps.title: Execute Automated Integration Tests
steps.description: Before delivery, ensure all modules integrate correctly. Use the template's built-in testing harness to verify core functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create integration tests for the auth and billing flows using Playwright. Ensure edge cases like token expiration are covered.

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag in Claude Code to review proposed file changes before committing to your repo.
Decouple your business logic from the UI components by creating a 'services' folder that Antigravity recognizes natively.
Leverage the .env.example files provided in the template as a source of truth for your client onboarding documentation.
Use Claude Code's 'commit' feature to automatically generate descriptive, conventional-commit messages based on your AI-driven changes.
Keep your database migrations small and frequent to prevent the 'schema-drift' that often breaks production SaaS environments.
content.next_steps: Once the boilerplate is deployed, focus on building the 'Unique Value Proposition' feature that makes your client's SaaS stand out. Use the time saved to refine the UI/UX and improve your project's SEO.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with infrastructure and start shipping products that clients love. With the right tools, your potential is limitless. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
